1.content:
# EasyTrade Microservices Portfolio

**Dynatrace + EasyTrade (19+ polyglot services)**

- Deployment: Helm oci://.../easytrade v1.5.2, ns=easytrade, kind-dt-homelab + DynaKube (applicationMonitoring).
- Services: Java (accountservice etc.), .NET, Go (incl. problem-operator), Node (frontend/loadgen), C++, nginx, RabbitMQ, MSSQL.
- Data: loadgen + problem-operator for traces/errors/Davis problems.
- Self-healing workflows via dtctl.
- Access: localhost:8081 (demouser/demopass). Mobile friendly.

Re-deploy: dtctl apply -f dynatrace/dashboards/easytrade-microservices.json --context my-env

2.title: K8s Pods - easytrade Namespace
2.query: smartscapeNodes K8S_POD | filter k8s.namespace.name == "easytrade" | fields k8s.pod.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.pod.phase | limit 50

3.title: Service Response Time (Key Services)
3.query: timeseries avg(dt.service.request.response_time), by:{dt.service.name} | filter contains(dt.service.name, "loginservice") or contains(dt.service.name, "loadgen") or contains(dt.service.name, "accountservice") | limit 100

4.title: Davis Problems (EasyTrade)
4.query: fetch dt.davis.problems | filter status == "open" and (contains(title, "easytrade") or contains(affected_entity, "easytrade") or contains(affected_entity, "loginservice") or contains(affected_entity, "loadgen")) | limit 20
